spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "cache_backfillCompleteRatio")
 |> last()
 |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "db_latencyMs"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "uptimeSec"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Uptime trend; should be monotonically increasing except restarts.
spec.title: Uptime Over Time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "cache_backfillCompleteRatio"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
 |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _value: r._value * 100.0 }))

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadHitRate" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadHits" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadMisses"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Hit rate and read counters together for quick health checks.
spec.title: Cache Read Health

spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "counts_users" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_usersFree" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_usersPaid"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "counts_activeUsers24h" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_activeUsers7d" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_activeUsers30d"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "counts_overlaysActive" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_overlaysPaused" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_overlaysTotal"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "counts_activeOverlayOwnersFree" or
 r["_field"] == "counts_activeOverlayOwnersPaid"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_activeGrantCount" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_activeGrantUsers" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_activeGrantUsersOnFree" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_effectiveProUsersEstimate"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_grantsBySource_promo" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_grantsBySource_reverse_trial" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_grantsBySource_support" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_grantsBySource_system"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_activeGrantUsers" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_effectiveProUsersEstimate" or
 r["_field"] == "entitlements_grantsByEntitlement_pro_access"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Compare effective pro estimate with active granted users and pro-access grants.
spec.title: Pro Access Trend

spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "db_latencyMs")
 |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadHits" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadMisses" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalReadTotal" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_globalStaleHits"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Cache read volume and misses over time.
spec.title: Read Traffic

spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "cache_avatarEntries" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_clipEntries" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_gameEntries" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_entriesTotal"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "cache_clipSyncStates" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_clipSyncComplete"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "cache_staleValidatedClips" or
 r["_field"] == "cache_unavailableClips"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_lastRunDurationMs"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

spec.description: Duration of the latest scheduler run.
spec.title: Scheduler Duration

spec.query:
from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_batchSize" or
 r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_lastRunOwnerCount"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_totalRuns" or
 r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_totalFailures"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) =>
 r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_totalFailures"
 )
 |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
 |> difference(nonNegative: true)

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "uptimeSec")
 |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_intervalMs")
 |> last()

from(bucket: "clipify_monitor")
 |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "clipify_vm01")
 |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "scheduler_clipCache_lastRunOwnerCount")
 |> last()
